reviews.review_msg: Jin-me is defintely a professor everyone needs to encounter in their uni career since she does not put up with lazy thinkers, she forces you to critically re-analyze all of your projects, which I admire. The class itself was lacking but she defintely made up for it in the way your thinking radically changes. Sometimes can be a tad manic though

If you're always working in studio, you'll get an A even if your project is conceptually lame.  A students get As, B students Bs.  Expects you to live and breathe school and thinks a 3 credit class is a full time job. Students shouldn't work outside of school or have half a life. Uses the same 5 thesaurus words repeatedly.  Pretentious, narrow mind

She is ABSOLUTELY the BEST teacher in the visual arts department, HANDS DOWN!!!  Some students are a little intimidated by her, but that's only because she is so enthusiastic and passionate about helping students grow - she's really on your side, and is a fountain of info, ideas, and encouragement.  A+++ teacher!!!
AMAZING PROF!!!  She's totally interested in helping students find their own unique 'voice' or style - not a uniform, cookie-cutter approach at all!  SHE ROCKS!!!
excellent prof, very very helpful~must talk to her if having any questions or difficulties, she will definitely help u out!

AMAZING, CREATIVE, ALWAYS ACTIVE WITH STUDENTS AND ART PRACTICE, MOTIVATING, CARING, UNDENIABLY PASSIONATE, EXCELLENT, INFORMATIVE, GOES OUT OF HER WAY TO HELP YOU OUT, SYMPATHETIC AND ENCOURAGING, I LOVE JIN-ME, SHE PARTIES LIKE A ROCKSTAR!
knows her stuff, accessible, good feedback, nice person and great sense of humour. active practice and in touch.
